title: G4 Overclocking & Hardware Upgrades
description: Push your PowerMac G4 beyond stock speeds with safe overclocking techniques.
author: Hardware Retro
content:
Why Overclock?

Overclocking breathes new life into your G4. Many CPUs can run 20-30% faster.

Jumper Method

Quicksilver and MDD models have overclocking jumpers on the motherboard. Move them according to pinout diagrams.

Cooling

Replace thermal paste and add case fans before overclocking.

Conclusion

Start with small increases and stress test thoroughly.
